---
title: "Research"
---

## Working Papers

### The Health Returns to School Air Conditioning: Evidence from Heat-Related Ambulance Use in Japan

This paper studies whether school air conditioning reduces ambulance uses among school-age children in Japan.

Status: Under revision.

## Work in Progress

### Energy Affordability and Summer Health

This project examines whether electricity affordability affects summer health risks at home.

### Cold Temperature, Housing, and Health

This project studies the health impacts of cold temperature exposure, with a focus on in-home ambulance use in Japan.
